summary: Verified iteration-2 increment: public share links, SSE streaming for lyric generation, and shadcn AlertDialog replacing window.confirm. Backend: 11/11 new pytest cases pass (share idempotency, view_count increment, audio stream, list shares, 404 on unknown/revoked, revoke flow, SSE generate/complete/polish all emit status+delta+done with anthropic claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, plus non-stream regression). Frontend: SharePage renders branded header (AppHeader hidden), title, waveform, BPM/key/length/energy/mood tags, neon-highlighted [VERSE]/[CHORUS] lyrics, and CTA. SongDetail share-draft-btn opens dialog with populated /share/<slug> URL, Copy/Open/Revoke buttons. Studio Generate textarea visibly grows progressively via SSE (0 -> 204 -> 558 -> 916 chars over a few seconds). Library, Styles, and SongDetail draft delete all open shadcn AlertDialog (NO native confirms intercepted) — Library shows destructive 'Archive' button. Style delete confirmed flow works end-to-end.

issues: Waveform player on /share/<slug> shows '0:00 / 0:00' until play is pressed; if duration is unknown until decode, consider preloading metadata so length displays immediately.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~790 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers (songs.py, drafts.py, shares.py, lyrics.py, streaming.py).

stream_router._cloud_word_trickle awaits the full LLM response before trickling, which causes a ~10-20s blank period before deltas begin (UI shows 'SUMMONING…' but no progress). Consider switching to anthropic streaming SDK for true token streaming on the cloud path.

ShareDialog uses an element (likely <input readOnly> wrapped or a div) that Playwright can read but URL is not selectable as input by default — testid is correct but a real <input readOnly> would be more accessible.
Existing observation from iter1 still valid: @app.on_event deprecated; librosa first-call blocking; consider rate-limiting /api/lyrics/*.
test_credentials: No auth required. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env used for cloud streaming (anthropic claude-haiku-4-5-20251001).
seed_data_creation: Reused /tmp/test.wav synthetic 2s WAV; new tests upload TEST_ShareSong + TEST_RevokeSong and tear them down. Cleaned up TEST_UI_Style created during UI run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_share_and_stream.py -v (~28s). Pre-existing share slug 'test-click-15b5ee' belongs to song 507190a9-b8e8-449b-a059-60b9062a05ab and is reused by SharePage UI tests. SSE word-trickle for cloud providers waits for full response first then trickles at 18ms/word; expect ~10-20s before first delta. AlertDialog testids: confirm-{song-delete|style-delete|draft-delete}-{dialog|confirm|cancel}. Share dialog testids: share-draft-btn, share-dialog, share-url, share-copy-btn, share-open-btn, share-revoke-btn. SharePage testids: share-page, share-title, share-lyrics, share-cta-create, share-brand-link.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All iteration-2 features pass.
